PropertyDisplayBuilderGetDisplayValuesAsync Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Builds display strings for the input values according to the property definition.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.DataSources
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public Task<IReadOnlyList<string>> GetDisplayValuesAsync(
	IPropertyContextBase context,
	IReadOnlyList<DbVal> values,
	bool useLongDisplay = false,
	CancellationToken ct = null
)

Parameters

context
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.DataSourcesIPropertyContextBase
Evaluation context
values
Type: System.Collections.GenericIReadOnlyListDbVal
Input values
useLongDisplay (Optional)
Type: SystemBoolean
Obtains long display values where applicable
ct (Optional)
Type: System.ThreadingCancellationToken
Supports cancellation

Return Value

Type: TaskIReadOnlyListString
Display strings in the order of the input values
